data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the system has a defined fallback mechanism for communication channels when the preferred method (SMS) is unavailable. The linked use case mentions that SMS is blocked during quiet hours and an email is sent instead, but it lacks concrete evidence of how this fallback is implemented or verified, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No concrete evidence of a defined fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fallback channel policy.
